fasta.title: Reference FASTA
fasta.description: Reference genome FASTA used to build the HISAT2 index.

hisat2_gtf.title: GTF Annotation (optional)
hisat2_gtf.description: Gene annotation GTF. Splice sites and exons will be extracted automatically. Cannot be used together with Splice Sites File or Exon File.

hisat2_ss.title: Splice Sites File (optional)
hisat2_ss.description: Pre-computed splice sites file (.ss). Cannot be used together with GTF Annotation.

hisat2_exon.title: Exon File (optional)
hisat2_exon.description: Pre-computed exon file (.exon). Cannot be used together with GTF Annotation.

hisat2_snp.title: SNP File (optional)
hisat2_snp.description: SNP file for building a SNP-aware HISAT2 index.

hisat2_haplotype.title: Haplotype File (optional)
hisat2_haplotype.description: Haplotype file for building a haplotype-aware HISAT2 index.

hisat2_version.title: HISAT2 Version
hisat2_version.description: Select the specific version of HISAT2 to use (see quay.io/biocontainers/hisat2 for available versions)

hisat2_extra_args.title: Extra Arguments
hisat2_extra_args.description: Additional arguments to pass to hisat2-build.
